mapper.select: SELECT t.* FROM tb_psm_moc t WHERE t.deleted = 0 ORDER BY t.created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_psm_moc WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT t.* FROM tb_psm_moc t WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_psm_moc WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_psm_moc WHERE moc_no LIKE #{prefix} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_psm_moc (moc_no, change_type, title, requester_name, requester_dept, request_date, target_date, reason, scope, risk_method, risk_result, risk_review_date, risk_opinion, status, plan_approver, created_by, modified_by, deleted, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{mocNo}, #{changeType}, #{title}, #{requesterName}, #{requesterDept}, #{requestDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{targetDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{reason}, #{scope}, #{riskMethod}, #{riskResult}, #{riskReviewDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{riskOpinion}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'DRAFT'), #{planApprover,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, #{createdBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, #{modifiedBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_psm_moc SET change_type = #{changeType}, title = #{title}, requester_name = #{requesterName}, requester_dept = #{requesterDept}, request_date = #{requestDate,jdbcType=DATE}, target_date = #{targetDate,jdbcType=DATE}, reason = #{reason}, scope = #{scope}, risk_method = #{riskMethod}, risk_result = #{riskResult}, risk_review_date = #{riskReviewDate,jdbcType=DATE}, risk_opinion = #{riskOpinion}, status = #{status}, plan_approver = #{planApprover,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, completion_approver = #{completionApprover,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, modified_by = #{modifiedBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_psm_moc SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
